title: planchonella imperialis
side_effects: Planchonella imperialis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, headaches, and dizziness in individuals who consume its unripe or toxic parts. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to allergic reactions, including skin rashes and respiratory issues. Prolonged exposure to its essential oils may also cause irritation to the eyes, skin, and respiratory tract. Furthermore, improper use of Planchonella imperialis can interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and diabetes.
